body:
## Problem

Describe the problem (concisely).
nvim crash after 9432e6c1e2e93ffffabeeeaeb6ccc0cbdf9609dd
## Steps to reproduce

```bash
rm /tmp/repro -r
mkdir /tmp/repro

cd /tmp/repro || exit

git clone https://github.com/ibhagwan/fzf-lua
cd fzf-lua || exit

>nvim cat <<EOF
#!/usr/bin/env bash
sleep 1
exec nvim "$@"
EOF

chmod +x nvim

make deps
PATH=.:$PATH make test glob=headless
```
Related: https://github.com/ibhagwan/fzf-lua/pull/2727#issuecomment-4450186619


```
(gdb) bt
#0  0x00007f022c49a29c in ?? () from /usr/lib/libc.so.6

#12 0x000055ceb60e34e5 in nlua_fast_cfpcall (lstate=0x7f022c831380, nargs=2, nresult=0, flags=0) at **/neovim/src/nvim/lua/executor.c:371
#13 0x000055ceb63c707b in uv__wait_children (loop=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>) at **/neovim/.deps/build/src/libuv/src/unix/process.c:174
#14 0x000055ceb63c9594 in uv__signal_event (loop=loop@entry=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>, w=w@entry=0x55ceb6596a70 <main_loop+560>, events=events@entry=1)
    at **/neovim/.deps/build/src/libuv/src/unix/signal.c:481
#15 0x000055ceb63d2157 in uv__io_poll (loop=loop@entry=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>, timeout=0) at **/neovim/.deps/build/src/libuv/src/unix/linux.c:1562
#16 0x000055ceb63be544 in uv_run (loop=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>, mode=UV_RUN_NOWAIT) at **/neovim/.deps/build/src/libuv/src/unix/core.c:460
#17 0x000055ceb60293d5 in loop_uv_run (loop=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>, ms=0) at **/neovim/src/nvim/event/loop.c:59
#18 0x000055ceb6029431 in loop_poll_events (loop=0x55ceb6596840 <main_loop>, ms=0) at **/neovim/src/nvim/event/loop.c:80

#33 0x000055ceb60f413c in main (argc=6, argv=0x7ffd811b6778) at **/neovim/src/nvim/main.c:682
```

## Expected behavior
no crash

## System info

- Nvim version (nvim -v): `v0.12.2` neovim/neovim@
- Vim (not Nvim) behaves the same?: ?
- Operating system/version: Linux 7.0.5-zen1-1-zen
- Terminal name/version: kitty
- $TERM environment variable: `xterm-kitty`
- Installation: ?

labels.description: wrong behavior that was introduced in a previous commit (please bisect)
labels.name: bug-regression

title: headless instance crash after 9432e6c1e2e93ffffabeeeaeb6ccc0cbdf9609dd
